h1: General Construction Services in Land O Lakes, FL
intro: Professional general contracting services for residential and commercial projects in Land O Lakes, FL. Titan Homes Group — FL Licensed #CBC1264713, fully bonded and insured.
bodyContent:
Titan Homes Group provides comprehensive general contracting services for residential and commercial clients throughout Land O Lakes, FL. As a licensed Florida General Contractor (License #CBC1264713), our team manages all trades, coordinates subcontractors, and ensures every project in Land O Lakes is completed on time, within budget, and to code.

Our Land O Lakes general construction services are ideal for clients who need a reliable, experienced contractor to manage complex projects. This includes commercial tenant improvements, retail and office build-outs, structural repairs, multi-family residential projects, and large-scale residential renovations that require professional general contractor oversight.

What makes Titan Homes Group the preferred general contractor for Land O Lakes clients is our open-book approach to budgeting, our detailed project scheduling, and our commitment to clear communication throughout every phase of construction. With 10+ years of experience and a BBB Accredited status, we are a trusted partner for Land O Lakes businesses and homeowners alike.

Our team of 20+ full-time professionals — including experienced project managers, skilled carpenters, licensed plumbers, and licensed electricians — brings the depth and expertise necessary to deliver any project in Land O Lakes to the highest standards.

faqs.question: Are you licensed for commercial construction in Land O Lakes, FL?
faqs.answer: Yes. Titan Homes Group holds Florida General Contractor License #CBC1264713 and is fully licensed, bonded, and insured for both commercial and residential construction projects in Land O Lakes and throughout Tampa Bay.

faqs.question: How do you manage subcontractors on projects in Land O Lakes?
faqs.answer: As your general contractor in Land O Lakes, we manage and coordinate all subcontractors — plumbers, electricians, HVAC technicians, framing crews, and specialty trades. You have a single point of accountability throughout the project.
